scope_notes: Foreman-orchestrated MMM product-fix wave retargeted by CS2 to explicitly adapt the legacy DomainAuditBuilder workflow into the current MMM app. The current PR diff is a 16-file current-head package: domain workspace wiring now reads `mmm_domains`, `mmm_maturity_process_steps`, and `mmm_criteria`, renders data-backed MPS/intent/criteria workflow surfaces, and adds behavior-based B4 coverage for routed-domain loading and canonical-card fallback setup state. This PR remains a read/inspect workflow adaptation; legacy AI generation wiring (`useAIMPSGeneration`, `useIntentGeneration`, `AIGeneratedCriteriaCards`, `EnhancedCriteriaGenerator`) is explicitly deferred to a follow-up wave.
